overview.titleZh: 本期多肽药物研发周报
overview.summaryZh: 本期收录14条文献研究及1条行业新闻。文献方面聚焦GLP-1类药物的多重作用，包括骨代谢、中枢效应、围手术期安全、骨折风险、乳腺癌生存、帕金森病、线粒体功能及动脉僵硬度等；此外涉及放射性核素标记PET药物剂量学、RPT命名法、225Ac-PSMA I&T 1期研究及177Lu-PSMA预后标志物。行业新闻提及阿斯利康中国交易、Kailera及恒瑞口服GLP-1数据。
themes: GLP-1受体激动剂的非代谢性作用及安全性
放射性核素标记多肽药物的临床前剂量学与临床转化
PSMA靶向放射配体治疗的剂量学与预后生物标志物

sections.summaryZh: 本期未收录公司与管线相关记录。
本期未收录临床与监管相关记录。
本期收录 14 条文献与会议相关记录，内容涵盖GLP-1受体激动剂在骨质疏松、中枢神经、围术期安全、骨折风险、乳腺癌生存、帕金森病、线粒体功能、动脉僵硬度等方面的研究，以及放射性核素标记PET药物剂量学、RPT命名法、225Ac-PSMA I&T 1期临床和177Lu-PSMA预后标志物评估。
本期收录 1 条专利、BD 与行业动态相关记录，涉及阿斯利康中国交易、Kailera和恒瑞口服GLP-1数据以及中国临床试验审查新闻摘要。

items.titleZh: GLP-1通过HIF-2-AKT信号调控BMSCs骨脂分化和糖皮质激素性骨质疏松支持
items.summaryZh: 发表在Stem Cell Reports的研究揭示GLP-1通过HIF-2-AKT信号通路调节骨髓间充质干细胞（BMSCs）的骨-脂肪分化命运，并在糖皮质激素诱导的骨质疏松中支持骨小梁结构。
items.whatItIsZh: 基础研究论文，探讨GLP-1对骨代谢的调控机制。
items.whyItMattersZh: 为GLP-1类药物在骨质疏松治疗中的应用提供了新的分子证据，但结论基于体外和动物模型，需进一步临床验证。
keyPoints: GLP-1通过HIF-2-AKT信号调节BMSCs的成骨-成脂分化
在糖皮质激素诱导的骨质疏松模型中支持骨小梁
items.originalTitle: GLP-1 regulates osteo-adipogenic fate of BMSCs via HIF-2-AKT signaling and supports trabecular bone in glucocorticoid-induced osteoporosis.
items.originalSummary: Stem Cell Reports | Yang Z, Li X, Wu N, Wang L, Lu Z, Wang L, Han S, Lu H. | journal article

items.titleZh: Semaglutide改变健康小鼠的行为和伏隔核振荡活动
items.summaryZh: 发表在Mol Brain的研究显示，semaglutide（司美格鲁肽）可改变健康小鼠的行为和伏隔核振荡活动，提示其对中枢神经系统有潜在影响。
items.whatItIsZh: 动物研究，探索GLP-1受体激动剂对大脑和行为的影响。
items.whyItMattersZh: 揭示了GLP-1药物可能的非代谢性中枢效应，但对象为健康小鼠，人类中的意义尚不明确。
keyPoints: Semaglutide影响健康小鼠的行为
改变伏隔核神经振荡活动
items.originalTitle: Semaglutide alters behaviour and nucleus accumbens oscillatory activity in healthy mice.
items.originalSummary: Mol Brain | Mosqueira A, Ansarifar S, Nabavi S, Moreno A. | journal article

items.titleZh: 心脏导管术前持续使用GLP-1受体激动剂的围手术期安全性
items.summaryZh: 发表在Am J Cardiol的研究评估了心脏导管术前持续使用GLP-1受体激动剂的安全性，结果支持在操作前无需停用。
items.whatItIsZh: 临床安全性研究，探讨GLP-1药物在围手术期使用风险。
items.whyItMattersZh: 为临床实践中心脏导管术围术期GLP-1用药管理提供了安全性证据，但需注意研究设计和人群局限性。
keyPoints: 心脏导管术前持续使用GLP-1受体激动剂是安全的
items.originalTitle: The Periprocedural Safety of Continued GLP-1 Receptor Agonist Prior to Cardiac Catheterization.
items.originalSummary: Am J Cardiol | Chi KY, Adhikari S, Chang Y, Mangalesh S, Lee PL, Damluji AA, Hu JR, Nanna MG. | journal article

items.titleZh: Semaglutide和Tirzepatide相比DPP-4抑制剂降低老年2型糖尿病患者的跌倒和股骨骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 发表在Osteoporos Int的回顾性分析显示，在老年2型糖尿病患者中，使用semaglutide或tirzepatide的患者相比于使用DPP-4抑制剂的患者，跌倒和股骨骨折风险更低。
items.whatItIsZh: 药物安全性比较研究，关注GLP-1药物对骨骼健康的影响。
items.whyItMattersZh: 提供了GLP-1药物相对于DPP-4抑制剂的潜在骨骼获益证据，但为回顾性设计，需前瞻性研究确认。
keyPoints: Semaglutide和tirzepatide降低跌倒和股骨骨折风险
与DPP-4抑制剂相比，风险更低
items.originalTitle: Lower fall and femoral fracture risks with semaglutide and tirzepatide compared with DPP-4 inhibitors in older adults with type 2 diabetes.
items.originalSummary: Osteoporos Int | Chen HY, Wu JY, Chu YH, Chen TW, Huang CF. | journal article

items.titleZh: GLP-1受体激动剂使用与合并2型糖尿病的乳腺癌女性总生存期的关联：回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 发表在Oncologist的回顾性队列研究发现，使用GLP-1受体激动剂与合并2型糖尿病的乳腺癌女性患者总生存期改善相关。
items.whatItIsZh: 药物流行病学研究，探索GLP-1药物对癌症患者生存的影响。
items.whyItMattersZh: 提示GLP-1药物可能对乳腺癌合并糖尿病患者有益，但回顾性研究无法排除混杂因素，需谨慎解读。
keyPoints: GLP-1受体激动剂使用与总生存期改善相关
items.originalTitle: GLP-1 receptor agonist use and overall survival among women with type 2 diabetes and breast cancer: a retrospective cohort study.
items.originalSummary: Oncologist | Nelson RA, Lai YC, Kil SH, Lee HS, Mortimer J, Wang PH. | journal article

items.titleZh: 胰高血糖素样肽-1激动剂治疗帕金森病的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 发表于Neurol Sci的一项荟萃分析综述了GLP-1激动剂在帕金森病中的应用。来源为系统综述与荟萃分析，DOI: 10.1007/s10072-026-09238-3。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇关于GLP-1激动剂治疗帕金森病的荟萃分析和系统综述。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该研究评估了GLP-1受体激动剂对帕金森病的潜在治疗效果，但证据限于已发表的文献质量，未提供具体疗效数据。
keyPoints: GLP-1激动剂在帕金森病中的荟萃分析
来源为文献综述，未提供临床结果数据
items.originalTitle: Glucagon-like peptide-1 agonists in Parkinson's disease: a meta-analysis.
items.originalSummary: Neurol Sci | Abdallah AK, Harb A, Mansour A, Nasreldin A, Hamdy R, Hatem N, Mosad N, Hamouda M, Hamouda A, Arumaithurai K. | meta-analysis; review; journal article

items.titleZh: TAAR1作为GLP-1之外的糖尿病和肥胖新药潜在分子靶点
items.summaryZh: 发表在Handb Exp Pharmacol的文章探讨TAAR1作为新型抗糖尿病和抗肥胖药物的替代分子靶点。DOI: 10.1007/164_2026_821。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇研究论文，提出TAAR1可能是GLP-1之外的抗糖尿病和抗肥胖药物新靶点。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该研究为多肽药物开发提供了新靶点思路，但证据为理论性探讨，无临床数据支持。
keyPoints: TAAR1被提议作为GLP-1替代靶点
来源为实验药理学手册的章节，未提供体内证据
items.originalTitle: TAAR1 as a Potential Alternate Molecular Target to GLP-1 for Novel Anti-diabetic, Anti-obesity Medications.
items.originalSummary: Handb Exp Pharmacol | Lenham RK, Elgammal F, Harding SV, Berry MD. | journal article

items.titleZh: 使用司美格鲁肽后出现部分可逆的双侧非动脉炎性前部缺血性视神经病变及分支视网膜动脉阻塞：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 发表于BMC Ophthalmol的病例报告描述了一例使用司美格鲁肽后出现的眼部不良事件。DOI: 10.1186/s12886-026-05122-y。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇病例报告，报道了使用GLP-1受体激动剂司美格鲁肽后发生的眼部并发症。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该报告提示司美格鲁肽可能引起罕见眼部不良反应，但仅为单个病例，不能确定因果关系，需进一步监测。
keyPoints: 司美格鲁肽使用后出现NAION和BRAO
病变部分可逆
单个病例报告，证据强度有限
items.originalTitle: Partially reversible bilateral non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy and branch retinal artery occlusion following semaglutide use. a case report.
items.originalSummary: BMC Ophthalmol | Alsakran WA, Alkhaldi HM, Magliyah MS. | journal article

items.titleZh: 胰高血糖素样肽-1受体激动剂对人源体外模型线粒体功能的直接作用：系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 发表于Metabol Open的系统综述和荟萃分析评估了GLP-1受体激动剂对线粒体功能的直接影响。DOI: 10.1016/j.metop.2026.100484。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇关于GLP-1受体激动剂直接作用于人源体外模型线粒体功能的系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该研究有助于理解GLP-1受体激动剂在细胞水平的作用机制，但证据仅限于体外模型，不能直接推断临床效果。
keyPoints: GLP-1受体激动剂对线粒体功能的直接作用
基于人源体外模型的系统综述
items.originalTitle: Direct effects of glucagon-like Peptide-1 receptor agonists on mitochondrial function in human-derived in vitro models: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.originalSummary: Journal: Metabol Open | Authors: Greenblatt ZL, Tork A, Cruz I, Fausak ED, Tran HA

items.titleZh: 替西帕肽对肥胖伴2型糖尿病患者心-踝血管指数评估的动脉僵硬度的影响：日本回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 发表于Obes Pillars的回顾性队列研究评估了替西帕肽对动脉僵硬度的效果，使用心-踝血管指数。DOI: 10.1016/j.obpill.2026.100291。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，研究了GLP-1/GIP受体激动剂替西帕肽对肥胖伴2型糖尿病患者动脉僵硬度的影响。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该研究为替西帕肽改善血管健康提供了真实世界证据，但回顾性设计存在偏倚，且为日本单中心数据。
keyPoints: 替西帕肽降低动脉僵硬度（CAVI评估）
日本肥胖伴2型糖尿病患者队列
回顾性研究，非随机对照
items.originalTitle: Impact of tirzepatide on systemic arterial stiffness assessed by cardio-ankle vascular index in individuals with obesity complicated by type 2 diabetes: A retrospective cohort study in Japan.
items.originalSummary: Journal: Obes Pillars | Authors: Nagayama D, Wakamatsu M, Watanabe Y, Ikeda M, Koshikawa Y

items.titleZh: 常见放射性核素标记PET药物的临床前剂量学在首次人体研究中的效用：辐射剂量估算的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 该研究系统回顾了1990年至2021年间关于常见PET放射性药物的临床前和临床辐射剂量估算文献。比较了动物来源和人体来源的全身有效剂量及最大器官吸收剂量系数，发现短半衰期放射性药物（如82Rb、15O、13N等）的动物与人体数据一致性更好，变异性更低；而长半衰期药物（89Zr、124I）的剂量估算值更高且变异性更大。结论认为临床前剂量学研究对短半衰期PET药物的辐射剂量预测更有价值。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇系统综述，评估临床前生物分布数据外推至人体辐射剂量估算的准确性。
items.whyItMattersZh: 该研究为PET放射性药物的首次人体研究设计提供了证据基础，明确了临床前剂量学对短半衰期药物的可靠性更高，而对长半衰期药物需谨慎。证据基于文献汇总，但未纳入新型放射性核素。
keyPoints: 短半衰期PET药物（如18F、68Ga）的动物与人体剂量估算一致性更好，变异性更低
长半衰期药物（89Zr、124I）的动物与人体剂量差异更大，剂量绝对值更高
items.originalTitle: Utility of Preclinical Dosimetry for First-in-Human Studies with PET Drugs Labeled with Common Radionuclides: A Systematic Review of Radiation Dose Estimates
items.originalSummary: First-in-human studies of radiopharmaceuticals include an estimation of human radiation doses often extrapolated from preclinical biodistribution data. We reviewed radiation dose estimates derived from preclinical and clinical studies to determine the utility of preclinical dosimetry studies for estimating the human radiation dose of PET radiopharmaceuticals. Methods: Literature searches were performed for preclinical and clinical studies published between 1990 and 2021 that provided radiation dose estimates for common PET radiopharmaceuticals. Whole-body effective dose and maximum organ absorbed dose coefficients derived from animal and human studies were compared to evaluate their agreement. Ratios of animal-derived to human-derived dose estimates were calculated. Dosimetry data were further stratified by pharmacophore, animal species, and animal-to-human extrapolation method. Results: The SD in radiation dose estimates from clinical studies was generally lower compared with the SD in dose estimates extrapolated from animals. An overlap in the distribution of radiation dose estimates derived from animal and human studies was observed for short-lived radiopharmaceuticals ( 82 Rb-, 15 O-, 13 N-, 11 C-, 68 Ga-, 18 F-, and 64 Cu-labeled, n = 394). The higher dose estimates and larger variability (spread) in preclinical and clinical radiation dose estimates observed for long-lived ( 89 Zr- and 124 I-labeled, n = 48) compared with short-lived radiopharmaceuticals highlight important differences in the radiation profile between the 2 groups. Conclusion: Our assessment of the agreement between animal and human radiation dosimetry data for PET drugs indicated a difference between short-and long-lived radiopharmaceuticals in terms of agreement, magnitude, and variability in dose estimates. A closer agreement between animal and human data, relatively lower doses, and lower variability in measured ED values in studies of short-lived PET radiopharmaceuticals suggest that appro

items.titleZh: 放射性药物治疗神经内分泌肿瘤、前列腺癌等的通用命名法开发
items.summaryZh: 随着放射性药物治疗（RPT）扩展至更多适应症，文章讨论了FDA 505(b)(2)新药申请途径，该途径支持基于已批准药物的类似药物审批，利用已发表文献和桥接研究。提出“放射性配体等效物”术语，指通过505(b)(2)途径批准的RPT，区别于仿制药。建立共同术语有助于跨学科沟通和治疗选择。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇观点文章，阐述RPT领域FDA审批路径及命名标准化。
items.whyItMattersZh: 为RPT领域的监管沟通和学术交流提供了术语框架，有助于加速类似药物开发和供应链韧性。但观点基于现有法规，未涉及实际审批案例。
keyPoints: 505(b)(2)途径为RPT类似药提供简化审批
提出“放射性配体等效物”定义以区别于仿制药
items.originalTitle: The Equivalents Are Coming! Developing a Shared Nomenclature for Radiopharmaceutical Therapy of Neuroendocrine Tumors, Prostate Cancer, and Beyond
items.originalSummary: As radiopharmaceutical therapy (RPT) expands beyond neuroendocrine tumors and prostate cancer, it is important to understand the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approval process and to establish a shared vocabulary for effective communication. The 505(b)(2) New Drug Application is a well-established mechanism for FDA approval of nuclear medicine products. It is an application for drugs that are similar to an approved product, supported by published literature and studies conducted on similar drugs, and bridging studies demonstrating the scientific relevance of the data to the product. This streamlined approval pathway can encourage development of more treatment options, facilitating greater patient access and improved resilience to supply chain disruptions. The evolving RPT landscape necessitates new nomenclature. "Radioligand equivalent" refers to an RPT approved through the 505(b)(2) pathway, distinct from a generic RPT approved through an Abbreviated New Drug Application. Establishing shared terminology supports clear multidisciplinary communication and fosters informed treatment selection.

items.titleZh: [225Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T治疗转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌的1期剂量递增研究：安全性、耐受性和剂量学分析
items.summaryZh: 该1期试验纳入9名mCRPC患者，给予递增剂量（8-12 MBq）的[225Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T治疗。常见不良事件为口干（89%）、贫血和不适。12 MBq队列出现2例剂量限制性毒性，推荐2期剂量为10 MBq。中位总生存期15个月。基于平面成像的剂量学显示肿瘤吸收剂量中位数为11.22 Gy/MBq。44%患者PSA下降≥50%。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是首项关于225Ac-PSMA I&T的1期剂量递增研究，评估安全性、耐受性和剂量学。
items.whyItMattersZh: 为225Ac-PSMA靶向α疗法提供了剂量学基础和安全性数据，但样本量小（9例），且SPECT/CT定量不可行，结果需更大研究验证。
keyPoints: 推荐2期剂量为10 MBq，基于12 MBq队列的剂量限制性毒性
最常见不良事件为口干（89%），其次为贫血和不适
肿瘤吸收剂量中位数11.22 Gy/MBq，PSA应答率44%
items.originalTitle: Phase 1 Dose-Escalation Study of [225Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T in Patients with Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer: An Analysis of Safety, Tolerability, and Dosimetry
items.originalSummary: Radiopharmaceutical therapy with 225 Ac-labeled prostate-specific membrane antigen ( 225 Ac-PSMA) has shown promising results in patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC). To date, no phase 1 dose-escalation or comprehensive dosimetry study of [ 225 Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T is available. Here, we present the results of the safety, tolerability, and dosimetry data of [ 225 Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T in a phase 1 trial. Methods: Nine patients with mCRPC were treated with an intended 2 cycles of escalating activity of [ 225 Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T, ranging from 8 to 12 MBq. After treatment with [ 225 Ac]Ac-PSMA I&T, patients were closely monitored for adverse events. Tumor response was evaluated using [ 68 Ga]Ga-PSMA I&T PET/MRI at 14 wk after therapy in accordance with RECIST version 1.1. For dosimetry, blood sampling was performed at 13 time points up to 7 d and urine sampling was conducted up to 24 h postinjection. Time-activity curves were calculated using the radionuclide daughters 213 Bi and 221 Fr. Whole-body planar images with or without SPECT/CT images were acquired up to 10 d postinjection. Results: Adverse events of any grade were observed in 8 of 9 patients. Xerostomia was most frequently (89%) reported, followed by anemia (44%) and malaise (44%). In the third cohort of patients who were treated with 12 MBq, 2 dose-limiting toxicities were observed, resulting in a recommended phase 2 dose of 10 MBq. The median overall survival was 15 mo (95% CI, 0.0-32.5 mo). The median absorbed doses for red marrow, kidneys, salivary glands, and tumors were 0.21, 1.59, 1.43, and 11.22 Gy/MBq, respectively, on the basis of planar images, blood and urine analysis, and [ 68 Ga]Ga-PSMA I&T PET/MRI. Dosimetry based on quantitative SPECT/CT images was not feasible for 225 Ac. A prostate-specific antigen response of 50% or greater was observed in 4 (44%) of 9 patients. Response was classified in accordance with RECIST 1.1, with partial response in 1 patient and stable and progressiv

items.titleZh: Fierce Pharma Asia——更多阿斯利康中国交易；Kailera、恒瑞口服GLP-1数据；中国临床试验审查
items.summaryZh: 文章报道阿斯利康与石药集团、中国生物制药签署潜在数十亿美元许可协议；恒瑞与Kailera合作的口服GLP-1候选药在中国公布的肥胖和糖尿病3期数据；以及生物技术业内人士批评美国议员对中国临床试验的审查分散注意力。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一篇行业新闻摘要，涵盖多项事件，其中涉及多肽药物（口服GLP-1）的临床进展。
items.whyItMattersZh: 恒瑞口服GLP-1的3期数据对多肽药物口服化具有临床验证意义，但新闻未提供具体疗效和安全性数值，信息有限。
keyPoints: 恒瑞/Kailera的口服GLP-1候选药在中国公布肥胖和糖尿病3期数据
items.originalTitle: Fierce Pharma Asia—More AZ China deals; Kailera, Hengrui’s oral GLP-1 data; Scrutiny of Chinese trials
items.originalSummary: AstraZeneca signed potential billion-dollar licensing deals with CSPC and Sino Biopharm, Hengrui's Kaleira-partnered oral GLP-1 candidate reported obesity and diabetes phase 3 data from China, and biotech insiders decried certain U.S. lawmakers' scrutiny over Chinese clinical trials as a distraction. And more.

items.titleZh: 两周期[177Lu]Lu-PSMA RPT后早期随访PSMA PET/CT对mCRPC患者的预后价值：与PSA动态变化的比较
items.summaryZh: 该回顾性研究纳入109名mCRPC患者，在基线及2周期[177Lu]Lu-PSMA RPT后行18F-PSMA-1007 PET/CT。比较PSMA肿瘤体积（PSMA-TV）、SUV均值、总病变PSMA（TL-PSMA）变化与PSA变化的预后价值。单因素分析显示PSMA-TV和TL-PSMA变化可预测总生存期（OS），25%阈值下TL-PSMA变化为OS的独立预测因子（HR=2.298, P=0.004），优于PSA变化。
items.whatItIsZh: 这是一项回顾性研究，评估早期PSMA PET/CT参数变化相对于PSA变化对mCRPC患者生存的预测价值。
items.whyItMattersZh: 确定TL-PSMA变化作为独立预后指标，可能优化177Lu-PSMA治疗的疗效评估，但回顾性设计及单中心数据限制了普适性。
keyPoints: TL-PSMA增加≥25%预示更短总生存期（HR=2.298）
TL-PSMA变化是OS的独立预测因子，优于PSA变化
items.originalTitle: Prognostic Value of Early Follow-Up PSMA PET/CT After 2 Cycles of [177Lu]Lu-PSMA RPT in Patients with mCRPC: Comparison with PSA Dynamics
items.originalSummary: Prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA) PET/CT is recommended for response evaluation during [ 177 Lu]Lu-PSMA radiopharmaceutical therapy (RPT) in patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC). Evidence supporting the predictive value of such a follow-up PSMA PET/CT relative to changes in prostate-specific antigen (PSA) monitoring is limited. Methods: This retrospective study evaluated 109 patients with mCRPC receiving [ 177 Lu]Lu-PSMA RPT. Patients underwent [ 18 F]F-PSMA-1007 PET/CT at baseline and after 2 cycles of RPT. We compared baseline and follow-up scans to assess relative changes in PSMA tumor volume (PSMA-TV), SUV mean , and total lesion PSMA (TL-PSMA, defined as PSMA-TV x SUV mean ). PSA change was also defined as the change from baseline to follow-up after the second cycle. The prognostic performance of laboratory and image-based changes for overall survival (OS) were then tested using univariate Cox regression. We also performed Kaplan-Meier analysis, applying a 25% threshold for increases in PSA level and PET-based parameters. Finally, direct comparison of the predictive value was tested in multivariate Cox regression, applying the same cutoff. Results: Relative changes in volumetric PET-based parameters after 2 cycles of RPT correlated significantly with the change in PSA level ( P 0.006 for each), validating the reliability of PET quantification of changes for response evaluation. In a univariate analysis, changes in PSMA-TV ( P = 0.012) and TL-PSMA ( P = 0.014) were predictive for OS, with PSA change providing comparable significance ( P = 0.012). Applying the established 25% threshold for increase, TL-PSMA change best identified patients at risk for shorter OS (hazard ratio [HR], 2.298; P = 0.004), outperforming both PSA change (HR, 1.292; P = 0.369) and PSMA-TV change (HR, 1.798; P = 0.024). Further, TL-PSMA change emerged as the sole independent predictor of OS in multivariate analysis ( P = 0.016). Conclusion: During R
